and rich too. He will have landed property and workers under him.
Between 25-27, the native will fall in love with a beautiful woman and
get ill-fame as a result of this affair. The presence of Mercury and Venus in
Cancer indicates birth of a daughter through a second woman.
He will start his own business at the age of 27. He will marry in his 28!h

242 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
' year. He will have ill health occasionally. From 28 to 32nd year the time will
be good. In his 33rd year, one brother will separate from him. The father will
fall ill. He will also get entangled in legal troubles at this juncture. Friln 35
onwards there will be improvement again.-He will earn fame between'38-40.
He will earn lakhs [of rupees and die at about 63 as a result of a paralytic
stroke.'
